tests.name: returns language from navigator.language
falls back to en when navigator.language is empty
tests.description: readSignals().language defaults to 'en' when navigator.language is falsy

tests.name: returns timezone from Intl.DateTimeFormat
tests.description: readSignals().timezone is a non-empty string from Intl API

tests.name: falls back to UTC when Intl is unavailable
tests.description: readSignals().timezone defaults to 'UTC' when Intl.DateTimeFormat fails

tests.name: returns screen dimensions as positive numbers
returns devicePixelRatio when available
tests.description: readSignals().devicePixelRatio is a number when window.devicePixelRatio exists

tests.name: returns null devicePixelRatio when undefined
tests.description: readSignals().devicePixelRatio is null when window.devicePixelRatio is undefined

tests.name: does not access localStorage or sessionStorage
tests.description: readSignals() must not touch Storage APIs
criteria: All values stay in memory only

tests.name: does not set cookies
tests.description: readSignals() must not write to document.cookie
criteria: All values stay in memory only

tests.name: returns object with exactly the expected keys
tests.description: readSignals() returns a plain object with only the specified BrowserSignals keys
criteria: All values stay in memory only
